title: andropogon miamiensis
intro: Andropogon miamiensis, also known as Miami grass, is a type of grass species native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andropogon miamiensis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical application and internal use.
